'''Tsaelke''' were a type of long-necked, graceful cetaceans from [[Chad/Legends|Chad]]. They were used as mounts by farmers on the planet to tend their herds. The creatures had barrel shaped bodies, long necks and small heads. They could carry up to 75 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]].<ref name="AJ10" />

[[Callista Ming]] designed her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] hilt with a bronze inlay of several of these creatures to remind her of her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

{{Creature-stub}}
